CREATE TABLE test_tuples (a Tuple(int, int), b Tuple(int, int), c Tuple(boolean, boolean));
SELECT tupleConcat(a, b) AS combined_tuple FROM test_tuples;
SELECT tupleConcat(a, tupleConcat(b, c)) AS nested_combined FROM test_tuples;
SELECT tupleConcat((1, 'text'), (2, 'more text'), (3, 'final text')) AS text_combined;
SELECT tupleConcat((1, 2, 3), (4, 5, 6), (true, false, true)) AS mixed_combined;
SELECT tupleConcat((1, NULL), (NULL, 4), (true, NULL)) AS null_combined FROM test_tuples;
CREATE TABLE test_subquery (id UInt32, values Tuple(int, int)) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT id, tupleConcat(values, (7, 8)) AS extended_values FROM test_subquery;
SELECT id, tupleConcat((a, b), (x, y)) AS overall_combined FROM (SELECT (1, 2) AS a, (3, 4) AS b, (5, 6) AS x, (7, 8) AS y) AS temp;
CREATE TABLE user_actions (user_id UInt32, action Tuple(String, String));
SELECT user_id, tupleConcat(action, ('timestamp', '2023-10-01 12:00:00')) AS action_with_timestamp FROM user_actions;
SELECT tupleConcat(a, b) AS final_result FROM (SELECT (10, 20) AS a, (30, 40) AS b) AS values_table;
